title: T-032 — UI: FIN-011 Cost Reporting Suite + MODAL-10 Export (fin_reports + export_report_modal, §8.4)
prompt:
# T-032 — FIN-011 Cost Reporting Suite + MODAL-10 Export

PRD: docs/prd/10-FINANCE-PRD.md §8.4 FIN-011 [UNIVERSAL]; §8.5 MODAL-10; §8.2 export endpoints; §13 RBAC matrix; §5.2 7y retention audit export.
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototypes:
- `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/finance/other-screens.jsx:1-142` (`fin_reports`)
- `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/finance/modals.jsx:539-584` (`export_report_modal`)

## Goal
Server Component page `/finance/reports` with 3 tabs (Saved Reports / Run Custom Report / Export Queue) + MODAL-10 export dialog. Reuses 12-REPORTING patterns where applicable. Async export pattern: client polls /api/finance/exports/[jobId]/status; auto-downloads when complete.

## Prototype parity
References pinned above.
shadcn primitives: Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger, TabsContent, Card, Table, Form, FormField, Input, Select, Textarea, Button, Badge for page; Dialog, RadioGroup, RadioGroupItem, Select, Input, Checkbox, Textarea, Button, Progress, Collapsible for MODAL-10.
Parity checklist (page):
1. Tab 'Saved Reports': card grid 3-col with system reports (seeded via migration: Cost by Product MTD, Cost by Period Monthly, Yield Loss Summary, WO Variance Summary, Inventory Valuation Snapshot, D365 Export Audit). Per card 'Run Now' Button → MODAL-10; kebab Edit/Duplicate/Delete/Schedule.
2. Tab 'Run Custom Report': form builder (name, description, type Select, date range DatePicker, filters multi-select, columns Checkbox list, sort/group by) + preview area with 25 rows + 'View All (N)' + footer; CTAs Run Preview / Run & Export CSV / Save as Report. Debounced preview Server Action 500ms.
3. Tab 'Export Queue': Table ID, Report Name, Requested By, Format, Status badge, Created At, Download/Retry; auto-refresh 30s.
4. RBAC: finance_manager (build + run); finance_viewer (run + export); auditor_readonly (run + export historical 7y).
Parity checklist (MODAL-10):
1. Dialog 'default'; reusable across all finance screens — accepts name/id prop to label export.
2. Format RadioGroup (CSV / PDF).
3. Date Range Select (MTD / Last Month / QTD / YTD / Custom). Custom option reveals two DatePickers via Collapsible.
4. Include filters Checkboxes (per report config).
5. Notes Textarea (only when fmt='PDF', goes to PDF footer).
6. Async export pattern: on Submit → Server Action `requestExport(config)` returns jobId; client polls `/api/finance/exports/[jobId]/status` every 3s via SWR; shadcn Progress; auto-trigger window.location.href=signedUrl when complete.

## Implementation contract
1. `app/finance/reports/page.tsx` — RSC fetches saved reports (seeded system + user reports) + export queue first page.
2. `app/finance/reports/_components/reports-tabs-client.tsx`.
3. `app/finance/reports/_components/saved-reports-grid.tsx`.
4. `app/finance/reports/_components/custom-report-builder.tsx`.
5. `app/finance/reports/_components/export-queue-table.tsx`.
6. `app/finance/_components/export-report-modal.tsx` — MODAL-10 shared with other screens.
7. `app/finance/_actions/reports.ts`: `previewReport(config)`, `requestExport(config)`, `getSavedReports()`, `saveReport(input)`, `deleteReport(id)`.
8. `app/finance/_lib/reports/handlers/` directory with one file per report type (`cost-by-product.ts`, `variance-summary.ts`, `yield-loss.ts`, etc) — each exports `query(config, db): Promise<Row[]>`.
9. Route Handler `apps/web/app/api/finance/exports/[jobId]/status/route.ts` (GET) — returns {status, signedUrl?} from export_queue table.
10. Route Handler `apps/web/app/api/finance/exports/[jobId]/download/route.ts` (GET) — streams CSV from Drizzle results via papa.unparse.
11. Migration `packages/db/migrations/0063_seed_finance_reports.sql` — seed 6 system reports.
12. `apps/worker/src/finance/export-worker.ts` — picks export_queue rows, runs query handler, uploads to Vercel Blob, updates status.

## Files
- apps/web/app/finance/reports/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/reports/_components/reports-tabs-client.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/reports/_components/saved-reports-grid.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/reports/_components/custom-report-builder.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/reports/_components/export-queue-table.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/_components/export-report-modal.tsx [create]

- apps/web/app/finance/_lib/reports/handlers/cost-by-product.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/_lib/reports/handlers/variance-summary.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/_lib/reports/handlers/yield-loss.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/_lib/reports/handlers/wo-variance-summary.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/_lib/reports/handlers/inventory-valuation-snapshot.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/_lib/reports/handlers/d365-export-audit.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/api/finance/exports/[jobId]/status/route.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/api/finance/exports/[jobId]/download/route.ts [create]
- packages/db/migrations/0063_seed_finance_reports.sql [create]
- apps/worker/src/finance/export-worker.ts [create]
- (one test per major component / action + 1 export-worker test)

## Acceptance criteria (Given-When-Then)
- Given the page renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/finance/other-screens.jsx:1-142, then 3 tabs + system reports grid + custom builder + export queue match — RTL snapshot + parity checklist. AND given MODAL-10 with fmt='CSV', when compared to prototype modals.jsx:539-584, then Notes Textarea + format Select render correctly.
- Given 'Custom' date range picked, when selected, then Collapsible expands with two DatePickers. AND given Submit clicked on MODAL-10, when requestExport returns jobId, then client polls /api/finance/exports/{jobId}/status every 3s until complete.
- Given custom builder typing, when 500ms after last keystroke, then previewReport runs once (debounced). AND given user without permissions, when accessing reports, then sees only own org's exports (RLS); auditor_readonly can access historical >1y (7y retention).
- Given migration 0063 ran, when SELECT count(*) FROM finance_reports WHERE is_system=true, then 6 rows exist. AND given export job entry created and worker processes, when status='complete', then signed Blob URL stored and getExportStatus returns downloadUrl.
Note: UI closeout must include screenshot/artifact evidence per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md` (verified via test_strategy + checkpoint_policy.closeout_requires; previously a separate AC, hoisted to process layer by Fixer F13 2026-05-14).
_(AC count consolidated from 9→4 by Fixer F13 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost))_

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: tests per tab + MODAL-10 (conditional Notes + Collapsible Custom range + async polling) + custom builder debounce + export queue auto-refresh + seed migration row count + export worker happy path + Route Handler download path.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run apps/web/app/finance/reports apps/web/app/finance/_components/__tests__/export-report-modal.test.tsx && pnpm --filter @monopilot/worker vitest run finance/export-worker`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not stream the full report inline on the Submit — async job pattern only.
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim.
- Do not store CSV/PDF artifacts > 7 years — link to retention scheduler.
- Do not bypass RLS in report queries — every handler reads from views/tables with org_id filter or via withOrgContext.
- Do not skip the signed URL expiry (1h max — translation note).
- Do not use HTML `<select>`.
- Do not regress accessibility.
- Do not block the page if export_queue is empty (render EmptyState).

pipeline_inputs.description: FIN-011 Cost Reporting Suite (3 tabs) + MODAL-10 async export + 6 seeded system reports + report handlers + export worker + signed Blob URLs.
pipeline_inputs.details: Async export pattern: server enqueues job, client polls every 3s, downloads via signed URL. 6 system reports seeded; user-saved reports support add/edit/delete. CSV via papa.unparse stream; PDF via Puppeteer edge function. Handlers in lib/reports/handlers/ — one file per report type for easy extension.
